dispatch_policy: Single project-level character board. Prefer direct parent image generation; if moved to background execution, use one Codex thread for the exact output path below.

jobs.thread_title: 断航故土 赫连雪岱高级熊族护卫多状态角色板 v05
jobs.worker_instruction: Use the image prompt exactly. Generate Helian Xuedai as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard whose bear identity is carried by oppressive face structure, white sideburn/nape fur, claw-shaped facial markings, huge clawed hands, and heavy shield-axe body scale, not by prominent cute bear ears. Do not generate plush ears, teddy bear ears, headband ears, a soft doll face, bear-face beast head, Frosthoof deer guard, low-ranking tribesperson, or shaman. Save the final PNG to the expected output path. Keep rejected attempts in history.
